changeSet.author: restaurantos-agent
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE audit_events ( id BIGSERIAL NOT NULL, tenant_id UUID NOT NULL, branch_id UUID, user_id UUID, action VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, resource_type VARCHAR(255), resource_id VARCHAR(255), before_state JSONB, after_state JSONB, ip_address VARCHAR(45), user_agent TEXT, occurred_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), metadata JSONB, PRIMARY KEY (id, occurred_at) ) PARTITION BY RANGE (occurred_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_events_tenant_occurred ON audit_events (tenant_id, occurred_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_events_action ON audit_events (action, occurred_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_events_resource ON audit_events (resource_type, resource_id, occurred_at DESC);
GRANT INSERT ON audit_events TO audit_writer;
REVOKE UPDATE, DELETE ON audit_events FROM audit_writer;
GRANT USAGE, SELECT ON SEQUENCE audit_events_id_seq TO audit_writer;

changeSet.author: restaurantos-agent
